title: Mushroom & Lentil Gnocchi
summary: A beautifully easy mushroom and lentil ragu tossed with pillowy gnocchi. Weeknight dinner made easy.

method.description: Reheat the Mushroom & Lentil Ragú in a saucepan set over a medium heat.
Cook the gnocchi in boiling water according to package instructions, or until they float to the top.

Remove the gnocchi from the boiling water using a slotted spoon and transfer directly into the ragù. Add a slosh of the gnocchi cooking water and mix well. Pour in the cream and mix before tasting and adjusting the seasoning with salt and pepper. Serve up in bowls topped with finely chopped chives, grated Parmesan, and black pepper.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
